mapper.select: SELECT product_id, seller_id, purchaser_id, product_name, description, price, p_condition, category_id, status, image_path, is_banned, created_at, updated_at FROM products WHERE product_id = #{productId}
SELECT product_id, seller_id, purchaser_id, product_name, description, price, p_condition, category_id, status, image_path, is_banned, created_at, updated_at FROM products ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT product_id, seller_id, purchaser_id, product_name, description, price, p_condition, category_id, status, image_path, is_banned, created_at, updated_at FROM products WHERE status = 'OPEN' AND is_banned = FALSE ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT product_id, seller_id, purchaser_id, product_name, description, price, p_condition, category_id, status, image_path, is_banned, created_at, updated_at FROM products
status = 'OPEN'
AND is_banned = FALSE
AND ( product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND category_id = #{categoryId}
ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO products ( seller_id, purchaser_id, product_name, description, price, p_condition, category_id, status, image_path, is_banned ) VALUES ( #{sellerId}, #{purchaserId}, #{productName}, #{description}, #{price}, #{pCondition}, #{categoryId}, 'OPEN', #{imagePath}, FALSE )
mapper.update: UPDATE products SET product_name = #{productName}, description = #{description}, price = #{price}, p_condition = #{pCondition}, category_id = #{categoryId}, image_path = #{imagePath} WHERE product_id = #{productId}
UPDATE products SET purchaser_id = #{purchaserId}, status = 'LOCKED' WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND status = 'OPEN' AND is_banned = FALSE
mapper.select: SELECT product_id, seller_id, purchaser_id, product_name, description, price, p_condition, category_id, status, image_path, is_banned, created_at, updated_at FROM products WHERE seller_id = #{sellerId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT product_id, seller_id, purchaser_id, product_name, description, price, p_condition, category_id, status, image_path, is_banned, created_at, updated_at FROM products WHERE purchaser_id = #{purchaserId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT product_id, seller_id, purchaser_id, product_name, description, price, p_condition, category_id, status, image_path, is_banned, created_at, updated_at FROM products WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE products SET is_banned = TRUE WHERE product_id = #{productId}
UPDATE products SET is_banned = FALSE WHERE product_id = #{productId}
